title: GDPR Identity Dimension Risk Mapping
description: Maps each MBTI++ Identity Dimension (and related profile fields) to a GDPR sensitivity risk level. Risk levels determine whether a dimension is redacted before cross-node mediation when user consent is insufficient.
gdprBasis: GDPR Article 9 — Special Category Data (psychological/behavioural profiling)

riskLevels.high: Special category data or strong psychological proxy. Redacted unless explicit consent is given.
riskLevels.medium: Behavioural pattern data that can indirectly profile an individual. Redacted at low consent.
riskLevels.low: General style/preference data with minimal individual privacy impact. Shared unless consent is explicitly withheld.

extraversion_introversion.rationale: Reveals social behaviour patterns; indirect psychological profiling.

sensing_intuition.rationale: Cognitive processing style; contributes to psychological profile.

thinking_feeling.rationale: Emotional orientation is a psychological characteristic potentially qualifying as special-category data under GDPR Art. 9.

assertive_turbulent.rationale: Emotional stability proxy; closely correlated with mental-health indicators (GDPR Art. 9 special category).

individualism_collectivism.rationale: May reveal political or ideological views, which are special-category data under GDPR Art. 9.

cautious_bold.rationale: Risk-tolerance indicator; may be used in financial profiling contexts.

internal_external.rationale: Motivation orientation; contributes to psychological profile.

task_people.rationale: Social/emotional orientation in work contexts; contributes to psychological profile.

values.rationale: Personal values may reveal religious beliefs, political opinions, or other special-category data.

professionalFocus.rationale: Occupational interests can be used to infer socioeconomic status.

socialEnergy.battery.rationale: Energy level may serve as a proxy for mental/physical health state.

socialEnergy.preferredTone.rationale: Communication style preference; minimal privacy impact.

meta.confidenceScore.rationale: Internal model metric; minimal privacy impact.
